name: BBQ Pork Lo Mein
recipeIngredient: 2 Bok choy, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in plenty of boiling water until tender, drain and toss with sesame oil; set aside.
2. Combine sauce ingredients; set aside.
3. Heat wok, add oil. Add ginger and stir fry until fragrant (about 10 seconds). Add bok choy, bean sprouts, and pork. Stir fry for 2 minutes.
4. Add broth, then when the broth is hot, add noodles. Cover and cook for 2 minutes.
5. Add sauce, stir well, and serve. Variations: Instead of pork, use leftover cooked roast beef, lamb, shrimp, or chicken. Other fresh vegetables in season can be used instead of sprouts and bok choy.
